# Meet Samantha: the Ruler of Recruiting

_This post is part of a bi-weekly series in which we get to know Sifties._

Samantha Cowan is a recruiter who…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift

Dec 15, 2017

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

_This post is part of a bi-weekly series in which we get to know Sifties._

* * *

Samantha Cowan is a recruiter who has been with Sift Science for a year. If she could be any animal, it would be a black wild mustang because they’re so beautiful and free.

### What three traits define you?

1.  Loyalty
2.  Compassion
3.  Strength

### Where is your favorite place to be?

Tulum, Mexico. I went there randomly four years ago on my birthday with my now-husband, and have gone back three times since and we just got married there last month! It’s very relaxing there, with beautiful white sand and turquoise water.

### How did you get interested in being a recruiter?

I was in HR at another company for my first corporate job and I wasn’t stimulated by it — I did benefits administration and data entry. An opportunity came up in recruiting and I went for it! I loved the idea of helping people find their dream job. That was in 2012 and I haven’t looked back since.

### What did you want to be when you were a kid?

A pediatrician. I always liked the idea of helping kids, and – of course – being a doctor seemed cool. But math and science weren’t my strong suit.

### You used to do taekwondo. Tell me about it!

My mom enrolled my sister and me in 4th grade — she wanted us to be strong and have more extracurriculars (at the time we just played soccer). We both got up to a brown belt, then I got to 6th grade I didn’t think it was cool anymore so I quit. I wish I would’ve kept up with it because it would’ve been pretty badass.
